chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Const. Petition No. D - 1257 of 2026 __________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) 1. For orders on office objection 2. For orders on CMA No.4883/2026 3. For hearing of main case 07.04.2026 Malik Waseem Iqbal, Advocate for the petitioners. Ms. Shazia Hanjrah, DAG. Mr. Fahim Hussain, DPG along with SIP Noor Ahmed, PS Manghopir. ------------------------------------ MUHAMMAD SALEEM JESSAR, J: Through this petition, the petitioners have sought the following reliefs: i. Declare that the repeated raids At the very outset, Ms. Shazia Hanjrah, learned DAG, submitted that official respondents are legally bound to provide legal protection to all the citizens including the petitioner swithout any discrimination. She after going through the record, ensures that official respondents shall conduct themselves strictly in accordance with law and provide legal protection of life, honour and property to the petitioners in the manner that no one shall cause them harassment. Learned counsel for the petitioners being satisfied with the above statement sought disposal of instant petition with directions to the official respondents to provide necessary protection to the petitioners in the manner that no one shall cause them harassment. In view of the statement rendered by learned DAG, instant petition stands disposed of with directions to official respondents to conduct themselves strictly in accordance with law and provide necessary legal protection of life, liberty, honour and property to petitioners in the manner that no one shall cause them harassment.

Learned counsel for the petitioners being satisfied with the above statement sought disposal of instant petition with directions to the official respondents to provide necessary protection to the petitioners in the manner that no one shall cause them harassment. In view of the statement rendered by learned DAG, instant petition stands disposed of with directions to official respondents to conduct themselves strictly in accordance with law and provide necessary legal protection of life, liberty, honour and property to petitioners in the manner that no one shall cause them harassment. The instant petition along with listed application stands disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Azeem
